description:
If you're considering health or term insurance, book a FREE 30-minute call with our top advisors. Get spam-free, high-quality advice tailored just for you - https://ditto.sh/sqnk0t 

Ditto's Cut—How we select plans and insurers: https://joinditto.in/articles/general/dittos-cut/

Premium health insurance plans sound similar on paper, but performance tells the real story. Last year, we highlighted ICICI Lombard Elevate's impressive add-on ecosystem and unique features like surrogate coverage. Now, with 2025 updates showing an 85% claim settlement ratio—below industry average—it's time to revisit this plan. Does extensive customization at competitive pricing outweigh service concerns? We break down the complete picture.

In this updated ICICI Lombard Elevate 2025 review:

Updated performance metrics—85% CSR vs industry average, complaint ratios, network analysis
Plan eligibility & options—flexible tenures (1-5 years), unlimited coverage options, family structures
Core features breakdown—room rent restrictions, unlimited restoration, 20% annual bonus structure
Built-in standout features—surrogate coverage (₹5L), 2-hour hospitalization, nursing at home benefits
29 add-ons ecosystem—jumpstart PED reduction, infinite care, power booster, worldwide coverage
Waiting periods analysis—90-day fast-track for diabetes/hypertension, standard PED timelines
Premium comparison—₹9,512 individual vs ₹16,843 HDFC Ergo, ₹13,951 Care Supreme
Discount structures—multi-tenure benefits, credit score discounts, early renewal savings
Ditto's honest assessment—customization strengths vs operational metric concerns
Alternative recommendations—when Elevate works vs premium competitors

By the end of this video, you'll know whether Elevate's extensive features and competitive pricing justify the below-average claim settlement performance.

Overwhelmed by Elevate's 29 add-ons or concerned about the 85% CSR? Book a FREE consultation with Ditto's advisors to understand which customization options make sense for your profile and how this compares with alternatives: https://ditto.sh/sqnk0t

0:00 — Revisiting ICICI Lombard Elevate in 2025

WE WILL HAVE TO GIVE UNDERWRITNG FOR EVERY RENEWAL ABOUT OUR HEALTH CONDITIONS AND ICICI CAN REJECT RENEWAL  OR CAN INCREASE PREMIUM OR REJECT A CLAIM ON THE BASIS OF THIS. THIS IS THE BIGGEST DRAW BACK. NO OTHER COMPANY ASKS FOR AN UNDERWRITING

comments.author: @vimarsakan1

comments.text:
"No fresh underwriting at renewal stage
where there is no change in sum insured
offered shall be applicable. Provided that
where there is an improvement in the risk
profile, the company may endeavor to
recognize that for removal of loadings at the
point of renewal."
THESE ARE THE POLICY WORDINGS. COMPANY MAY ASK FOR UNDERWRITNG FOR EVERY RENEWAL AND CAN REJECT RENEWAL OR CLAIM ON THE BASIS OF THIS.
